content: Hi, I'm looking to renovate my home office in Phoenix. I want to make it more comfortable and functional.
That sounds like a great project! What kind of changes are you thinking of making?
I'm thinking of getting a new desk and chair, and maybe some more shelving. I've also been considering getting a standing desk.
A standing desk is a great idea. As a physical therapist, you must know the importance of taking care of your body.
Yeah, I do. I've been working with patients who have sports injuries, and I see how important it is to take care of your body. I've also been knitting in my free time, it's a great way to relax.
Knitting is a great hobby. It's so calming and creative. Do you find that it helps you unwind after a long day of work?
Yeah, it does. I've also been enjoying archery and hiking in my free time. I love being outdoors and challenging myself physically.
That's really cool. It's great that you have so many interests and hobbies. Do you find that they help you balance out your work and personal life?
Yeah, they do. I've also been taking classes for my part-time MBA, so it's been a bit of a challenge to balance everything.
That's impressive. An MBA is a big undertaking. What made you decide to pursue it?
I wanted to learn more about the business side of things and advance my career. I've been working as a physical therapist for a while now, and I feel like I'm ready for a new challenge.
That makes sense. It's always good to challenge yourself and learn new things. Do you have any plans for after you finish your MBA?
Yeah, I'm thinking of starting my own practice. I've been thinking about it for a while now, and I think it's time to take the leap.
That's exciting! Starting your own practice can be a bit daunting, but it's also a great opportunity. Do you have any experience with business planning or management?
No, not really. But I'm willing to learn. I've been reading some books and taking some online courses to prepare myself.
That's great. It's always good to be proactive and take initiative. I think you'll do well with your own practice.
Thanks, I appreciate the vote of confidence. I'm looking forward to the challenge.
You're welcome. It was great chatting with you. Good luck with your home office renovation and your future plans!
